component.author: Phenotype Team
component.name: phenotype-crypto
component.description: Cryptographic utilities for Phenotype — hashing, symmetric encryption, key derivation, and HMAC signatures

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: aead
components.description: Traits for Authenticated Encryption with Associated Data (AEAD) algorithms, such as AES-GCM as ChaCha20Poly1305, which provide a high-level API

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: aes-gcm
components.description: Pure Rust implementation of the AES-GCM (Galois/Counter Mode) Authenticated Encryption with Associated Data (AEAD) Cipher with optional architecture-specific hardware acceleration

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: aes
components.description: Pure Rust implementation of the Advanced Encryption Standard (a.k.a. Rijndael)

components.author: David Roundy <roundyd@physics.oregonstate.edu>
components.name: arrayref
components.description: Macros to take array references of slices

components.author: bluss
components.name: arrayvec
components.description: A vector with fixed capacity, backed by an array (it can be stored on the stack too). Implements fixed capacity ArrayVec and ArrayString.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: base64ct
components.description: Pure Rust implementation of Base64 (RFC 4648) which avoids any usages of data-dependent branches/LUTs and thereby provides portable "best effort" constant-time operation and embedded-friendly no_std support

components.author: Jack O'Connor <oconnor663@gmail.com>, Samuel Neves
components.name: blake3
components.description: the BLAKE3 hash function

licenses.expression: CC0-1.0 OR Apache-2.0 OR Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: block-buffer
components.description: Buffer type for block processing of data

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: block-padding
components.description: Padding and unpadding of messages divided into blocks.

components.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: cc
components.description: A build-time dependency for Cargo build scripts to assist in invoking the native C compiler to compile native C code into a static archive to be linked into Rust code.

components.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: cfg-if
components.description: A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg] parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the item that gets emitted.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: cipher
components.description: Traits for describing block ciphers and stream ciphers

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: const-oid
components.description: Const-friendly implementation of the ISO/IEC Object Identifier (OID) standard as defined in ITU X.660, with support for BER/DER encoding/decoding as well as heapless no_std (i.e. embedded) support

components.author: Cesar Eduardo Barros <cesarb@cesarb.eti.br>
components.name: constant_time_eq
components.description: Compares two equal-sized byte strings in constant time.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: cpufeatures
components.description: Lightweight runtime CPU feature detection for aarch64, loongarch64, and x86/x86_64 targets,  with no_std support and support for mobile targets including Android and iOS

components.name: crossbeam-deque
components.description: Concurrent work-stealing deque

components.name: crossbeam-epoch
components.description: Epoch-based garbage collection

components.name: crossbeam-utils
components.description: Utilities for concurrent programming

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: crypto-common
components.description: Common cryptographic traits

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: ctr
components.description: CTR block modes of operation

components.author: Isis Lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, Henry de Valence <hdevalence@hdevalence.ca>
components.name: curve25519-dalek
components.description: A pure-Rust implementation of group operations on ristretto255 and Curve25519

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: der
components.description: Pure Rust embedded-friendly implementation of the Distinguished Encoding Rules (DER) for Abstract Syntax Notation One (ASN.1) as described in ITU X.690 with full support for heapless no_std targets

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: digest
components.description: Traits for cryptographic hash functions and message authentication codes

components.author: isis lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, Tony Arcieri <bascule@gmail.com>, Michael Rosenberg <michael@mrosenberg.pub>
components.name: ed25519-dalek
components.description: Fast and efficient ed25519 EdDSA key generations, signing, and verification in pure Rust.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: ed25519
components.description: Edwards Digital Signature Algorithm (EdDSA) over Curve25519 (as specified in RFC 8032) support library providing signature type definitions and PKCS#8 private key decoding/encoding support

components.name: find-msvc-tools
components.description: Find windows-specific tools, read MSVC versions from the registry and from COM interfaces

components.author: Bartłomiej Kamiński <fizyk20@gmail.com>, Aaron Trent <novacrazy@gmail.com>
components.name: generic-array
components.description: Generic types implementing functionality of arrays

components.author: The Rand Project Developers
components.name: getrandom
components.description: A small cross-platform library for retrieving random data from system source

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: ghash
components.description: Universal hash over GF(2^128) useful for constructing a Message Authentication Code (MAC), as in the AES-GCM authenticated encryption cipher.

components.author: KokaKiwi <kokakiwi@kokakiwi.net>
components.name: hex
components.description: Encoding and decoding data into/from hexadecimal representation.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: hmac
components.description: Generic implementation of Hash-based Message Authentication Code (HMAC)

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: inout
components.description: Custom reference types for code generic over in-place and buffer-to-buffer modes of operation.

components.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: jobserver
components.description: An implementation of the GNU Make jobserver for Rust.

components.author: The Rust Project Developers
components.name: libc
components.description: Raw FFI bindings to platform libraries like libc.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: opaque-debug
components.description: Macro for opaque Debug trait implementation

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: pbkdf2
components.description: Generic implementation of PBKDF2

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: pkcs8
components.description: Pure Rust implementation of Public-Key Cryptography Standards (PKCS) #8: Private-Key Information Syntax Specification (RFC 5208), with additional support for PKCS#8v2 asymmetric key packages (RFC 5958)

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: polyval
components.description: POLYVAL is a GHASH-like universal hash over GF(2^128) useful for constructing a Message Authentication Code (MAC)

components.author: The CryptoCorrosion Contributors
components.name: ppv-lite86
components.description: Cross-platform cryptography-oriented low-level SIMD library.

components.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>, Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: proc-macro2
components.description: A substitute implementation of the compiler's `proc_macro` API to decouple token-based libraries from the procedural macro use case.

components.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
components.name: quote
components.description: Quasi-quoting macro quote!(...)

components.author: The Rand Project Developers, The Rust Project Developers
components.name: rand
components.description: Random number generators and other randomness functionality.

components.name: rand_chacha
components.description: ChaCha random number generator

components.name: rand_core

components.name: rustc_version
components.description: A library for querying the version of a installed rustc compiler

components.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
components.name: semver
components.description: Parser and evaluator for Cargo's flavor of Semantic Versioning

components.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
components.name: serde
components.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

components.name: serde_core

components.name: serde_derive

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: sha2
components.description: Pure Rust implementation of the SHA-2 hash function family including SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512.

components.author: comex <comexk@gmail.com>, Fenhl <fenhl@fenhl.net>, Adrian Taylor <adetaylor@chromium.org>, Alex Touchet <alextouchet@outlook.com>, Daniel Parks <dp+git@oxidized.org>, Garrett Berg <googberg@gmail.com>
components.name: shlex
components.description: Split a string into shell words, like Python's shlex.

components.name: signature
components.description: Traits for cryptographic signature algorithms (e.g. ECDSA, Ed25519)

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: spki
components.description: X.509 Subject Public Key Info (RFC5280) describing public keys as well as their associated AlgorithmIdentifiers (i.e. OIDs)

components.author: Isis Lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, Henry de Valence <hdevalence@hdevalence.ca>
components.name: subtle
components.description: Pure-Rust traits and utilities for constant-time cryptographic implementations.

components.name: syn
components.description: Parser for Rust source code

components.name: thiserror-impl

components.name: thiserror

components.name: typenum
components.description: Typenum is a Rust library for type-level numbers evaluated at     compile time. It currently supports bits, unsigned integers, and signed     integers. It also provides a type-level array of type-level numbers, but its     implementation is incomplete.

components.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
components.name: unicode-ident
components.description: Determine whether characters have the XID_Start or XID_Continue properties according to Unicode Standard Annex #31

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: universal-hash
components.description: Traits which describe the functionality of universal hash functions (UHFs)

components.author: Sergio Benitez <sb@sergio.bz>
components.name: version_check
components.description: Tiny crate to check the version of the installed/running rustc.

components.author: Joshua Liebow-Feeser <joshlf@google.com>, Jack Wrenn <jswrenn@amazon.com>
components.name: zerocopy-derive
components.description: Custom derive for traits from the zerocopy crate

components.author: Joshua Liebow-Feeser <joshlf@google.com>, Jack Wrenn <jswrenn@amazon.com>
components.name: zerocopy
components.description: Zerocopy makes zero-cost memory manipulation effortless. We write "unsafe" so you don't have to.

components.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
components.name: zeroize
components.description: Securely clear secrets from memory with a simple trait built on stable Rust primitives which guarantee memory is zeroed using an operation will not be 'optimized away' by the compiler. Uses a portable pure Rust implementation that works everywhere, even WASM!

components.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
components.name: zeroize_derive
components.description: Custom derive support for zeroize
